title: Fig. 2 in "Something old, something new, something borrowed, and the oioxeny is true": description of Plectanocotyle jeanloujustinei n. sp. (Polyopisthocotylea, Plectanocotylidae) from the MNHN Helminthology collection with novel molecular and morphological data for P. gurnardi (Van Beneden & Hesse, 1863) (sensu stricto) from Sweden
author: Cappelletti, Alice
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 2. Plectanocotyle gurnardi (Van Beneden and Hesse, 1863) sensu stricto ex Eutrigla gurnardus from the North Sea, Sweden, hologenophores, body lacking only a lateral part; excised used for DNA extraction A, (SMNH 216644). B, (SMNH 216645). C, (SMNH 216646).
